ecr.pullthroughcacherule.CfnAbout: Creates a pull through cache rule. A pull through cache rule provides a way to cache images from an external public registry in your Amazon ECR private registry.

ecr.pullthroughcacherule.EcrRepositoryPr.Description: The Amazon ECR repository prefix associated with the pull through cache rule.

ecr.pullthroughcacherule.UpstreamRegistr.Description: The upstream registry URL associated with the pull through cache rule.
